title: The Descent
description:
You thought Minecraft was safe.
You were wrong.

The Descent is a psychological horror modpack that unravels your sanity. Every sound lies, every shadow follows. This world watches… and waits for you to break.
body:
You thought Minecraft was safe.
You were wrong.

The Descent is not just a modpack—it's a slow unraveling of your sanity. Designed for those who crave dread, suspense, and the constant feeling of being watched, this psychological horror experience will pull you deep into a world where the familiar turns hostile, and reality fractures at the seams.

Your sanity that deteriorates with each disturbing encounter

Distorted environments and shifting soundscapes that mess with your mind

Cursed dimensions that defy logic and tempt you to explore

Entities that don’t just chase you—they remember you

Environmental storytelling that leaves clues… or misleads you

Every session feels different. Every sound could be real—or not.
You're not just surviving anymore. You're descending... :]

Warning: Not for the faint of heart. Play with headphones. Preferably alone.
